---
title: "Optimization"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .navbar::before {
    background: transparent !important;
  }
</style>

<div class="container" style="padding: 0 2rem 4rem 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">

  <div class="subject-hero">
    <h1 class="hero-title" style="color: #fff;">Optimization for Machine Learning</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Comprehensive mathematical foundations and techniques.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="subject-intro">
    <p>
      Select a topic from the sections below to explore detailed derivations, proofs, and
      applications in modern machine learning.
    </p>
  </div>

  <hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); margin: 4rem 0;">

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Convex Optimization</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Convex Sets</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on convex sets.</p>
      <a href="optimization/convex-sets.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Convex and Concave Functions</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on convex and concave functions.</p>
      <a href="optimization/convex-and-concave-functions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Convex Optimization Problems</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on convex optimization problems.</p>
      <a href="optimization/convex-optimization-problems.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Duality and Constraints</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Duality</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on duality.</p>
      <a href="optimization/duality.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>KKT Conditions</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on kkt conditions.</p>
      <a href="optimization/kkt-conditions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Constrained Optimization</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on constrained optimization.</p>
      <a href="optimization/constrained-optimization.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Numerical Optimization</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Unconstrained Optimization</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on unconstrained optimization.</p>
      <a href="optimization/unconstrained-optimization.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Gradient Descent</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on gradient descent.</p>
      <a href="optimization/gradient-descent.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Newton's Method</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on newton's method.</p>
      <a href="optimization/newton's-method.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Minimax Optimization</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on minimax optimization.</p>
      <a href="optimization/minimax-optimization.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script src="/assets/card-tilt.js"></script>
```
